summary: Iteration 62 - Testing Signature Canvas Fix and AI Damage Detection. All 10 backend tests passed. Signature canvas fix verified via Playwright - signature persists after drawing and confirm button enables correctly. AI damage detection API working with GPT-5.2. DamageAnalyzer component properly integrated in VehicleInspectionForm.
critical_code_review_comments: SignatureCanvas.tsx fix verified: useRef for hasDrawn tracking prevents React re-render from clearing canvas
Canvas dimensions set via JS in useEffect (not JSX attributes) prevents clearing on state updates
State update (setCanConfirm) only happens on mouseup/touchend, not during drawing
DamageAnalyzer component properly imported and rendered in VehicleInspectionForm.tsx between checklist and general notes
POST /api/inspections/analyze-damage endpoint working correctly with GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key

success_rate.frontend: Signature canvas verified working via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs fixed and verified: (1) Signature canvas now persists drawings - fix uses useRef instead of useState for hasDrawn tracking, canvas dimensions set via JS not JSX, state updates only on mouseup/touchend. (2) DamageAnalyzer component now rendered in VehicleInspectionForm between checklist and general notes sections. AI damage detection API uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key.
